material programming talks series

For the Spring and Summer term 2026, we are organising a series of talks with knit and software researchers and practicioners.

22/04/2026: Peter van Hardenberg →

Ink & Switch are an independent research lab exploring the future of tools for thought

20/03/2026: Gerard Rubio →

Co-founder of digital knitting machine company Kniterate.

24/02/2026: Ilana Blumberg →

Independent knitwear designer and STOLL programmer

15/01/2026: B Claxton and Agnes Cameron →

UAL researchers B and Agnes discuss the Material Programming Project and Textiles Institute World Conference
